title: Tata CLiQ Capital India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Tata CLiQ Capital India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Tata CLiQ Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Tiruchirappalli operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Tata CLiQ Capital India:
Tata CLiQ Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata CLiQ Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
